## Orbiter Release Notes

This release includes binaries for both Linux and Windows platforms.

### Linux Binary
- Architecture: x86_64
- Dependencies: libtesseract.so.5.5 (dynamically linked)
- Installation: Run `install.sh` which will verify tesseract is installed

### Windows Binary  
- Architecture: x86_64
- Notes: All dependencies bundled or gracefully handled
- Installation: Run `Install Windows.bat` to install and configure

### Changelog
See GitHub releases for detailed changelog.
